name: All-in-One Salad Bowl
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green beans, cooked, drained and chilled
1 cup Peas, cooked, drained and chilled
2 cups Salad greens, broken into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the artichoke hearts, green beans, onion, peas, radishes, salad greens, and tomato wedges in a salad bowl.
2. Toss together lightly to combine.
3. In a separate jar or shaker, mix the remaining ingredients: oil, vinegar, sugar, salt, pepper, garlic, egg, and mustard pickle.
4. Blend thoroughly until well combined.
5. Pour enough dressing over the salad to moisten it evenly.
6. Toss gently again to ensure all ingredients are coated with the dressing.
7. Serve immediately or chill in the refrigerator for later use.
